title: colubrina articulata
intro: Colubrina articulata, also known as the Manzanillo or Manzanillo tree, is a shrub or small tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiparasitic properties. The health benefits of Colubrina articulata include the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as its use as an antiseptic to treat wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
